description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage that defines two jobs, rust-nightly and rust-stable. Use the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image for the rust-nightly job (marked allow_failure) and the rust:latest image for the rust-stable job. In each job run the commands rustc --version, cargo build --verbose, and cargo test --verbose in that order. Do not configure any caches, artifacts, or special rules, and only the build stage is defined.
